claim.observation: Trusted MFT/USN target-window summary records the target window as 2018-05-13T10:05:00Z..2018-05-13T10:15:59Z. The parsed USN CSV has 210,168 rows with global timestamp range 2016-11-04T13:28:03Z..2016-11-04T17:51:17Z; the retained USN range does not overlap the target window and USN_WINDOW_ROWS=0. The MFT CSV text scan records zero lines containing 2018-05-13 and zero lines containing the target 10:05..10:15 timestamp text.
claim.interpretation: For this EWF-derived MFT/USN pass, the retained USN journal provides no target-window rows, and the MFT CSV text scan provides no target-date timestamp lines. This is a filesystem-metadata availability boundary for the target window, not a movement-mechanism finding.
